text.title: Freelancer Personal CRM Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of CRM artifacts. Subagent must satisfy this before returning a schema, weekly review, or follow-up recommendation.

forbidden.pattern: More than three top-level tables (rejected: Activities, Notes-as-table, Deals separate from Leads)
Mandatory fields > 5 per table (optional fields are NOT in the contract)
Freeform / freetext stage values like "kinda interested" or "warming up"
"Follow up forever" cadence with no day-30 lost rule
Aging invoices beyond day 45 without a recorded operator decision (final notice OR pause)
Team-CRM features in the spec (assigned_to, team_visibility, role_permissions)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Add ONE optional field per table only after operator runs the schema for ≥ 4 weeks AND can name the workflow that needs it.
Substitute Notion / Airtable / Google Sheets / markdown — schema stays identical across tools.
Adjust cadence to 5-10-21-45 for high-trust referral leads, but only with explicit operator override.

list.item: Exactly three tables in the artifact
Each table has 5 mandatory fields, no more
Lead stages are the closed enum, no freeform values
Follow-up cadence is 3-7-14-30 (or explicit overridden value)
Invoice aging alarm fires at day 30
Weekly review slot is dated and recurring
